op_000012.proof_sketch: Reorder the triple union and apply weak union separately to obtain the three conditional independences. For the converse, use intersection on the `W` and `V` hypotheses to derive `G.Indep X (W ∪ V) (Z ∪ Y)`, then intersect that with the `Y` hypothesis and rewrite unions back to the target form.
op_000012.proof_text:
intro α G X Y W V Z
constructor
· intro h
  have hY : G.Indep X Y (Set.union Z (Set.union W V)) := by
    have h' : G.Indep X (Set.union Y (Set.union W V)) Z := by
      simpa [Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm, Set.union_comm] using h
    exact G.weak_union X Y (Set.union W V) Z h'
  have hW : G.Indep X W (Set.union Z (Set.union Y V)) := by
    have h' : G.Indep X (Set.union W (Set.union Y V)) Z := by
      simpa [Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm, Set.union_comm] using h
    exact G.weak_union X W (Set.union Y V) Z h'
  have hV : G.Indep X V (Set.union Z (Set.union Y W)) := by
    have h' : G.Indep X (Set.union V (Set.union Y W)) Z := by
      simpa [Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm, Set.union_comm] using h
    exact G.weak_union X V (Set.union Y W) Z h'
  exact ⟨hY, ⟨hW, hV⟩⟩
· rintro ⟨hY, ⟨hW, hV⟩⟩
  have hW' : G.Indep X W (Set.union (Set.union Z Y) V) := by
    simpa [Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm, Set.union_comm] using hW
  have hV' : G.Indep X V (Set.union (Set.union Z Y) W) := by
    simpa [Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm, Set.union_comm] using hV
  have hWV : G.Indep X (Set.union W V) (Set.union Z Y) :=
    G.intersection X W V (Set.union Z Y) hW' hV'
  have hYWV : G.Indep X (Set.union Y (Set.union W V)) Z :=
    G.intersection X Y (Set.union W V) Z hY hWV
  simpa [Set.union_assoc] using hYWV
op_000012.lean_error_excerpt: AutomatedTheoryConstruction/Scratch.loop.lean:15:8: error: Type mismatch: After simplification, term
op_000012.lean_error_fingerprint: AutomatedTheoryConstruction/Scratch.loop.lean:15:8: error: Type mismatch: After simplification, term | h | has type

op_000003.source_statement: ∀ (α : Type*) (G : SemiGraphoid α) (X Y W V Z : Set α), G.Indep X ((Y ∪ W) ∪ V) Z ↔ (G.Indep X Y Z ∧ G.Indep X W (Y ∪ Z) ∧ G.Indep X V ((Y ∪ W) ∪ Z))
op_000003.formalized_statement: ∀ (α : Type*) (G : SemiGraphoid α) (X Y W V Z : Set α), G.Indep X ((Y ∪ W) ∪ V) Z ↔ (G.Indep X Y Z ∧ G.Indep X W (Y ∪ Z) ∧ G.Indep X V ((Y ∪ W) ∪ Z))
op_000003.statement_formalization_notes: The input statement is already a valid Lean proposition over the existing `SemiGraphoid` structure.

op_000003.proof_sketch: Rewrite the outer union with `G.indep_union_iff X (Y ∪ W) V Z`, then rewrite the resulting `G.Indep X (Y ∪ W) Z` term with `G.indep_union_iff X Y W Z`. The goal becomes a reassociation of conjunctions.
op_000003.proof_text:
intro α G X Y W V Z
rw [G.indep_union_iff X (Y ∪ W) V Z, G.indep_union_iff X Y W Z]
constructor
· rintro ⟨⟨hY, hW⟩, hV⟩
  exact ⟨hY, hW, hV⟩
· rintro ⟨hY, hW, hV⟩
  exact ⟨⟨hY, hW⟩, hV⟩

op_000001.source_statement: ∀ (α : Type*) (G : SemiGraphoid α) (X X' Y Y' Z : Set α), X ⊆ X' → Y ⊆ Y' → G.Indep X' Y' Z → G.Indep X Y Z
op_000001.formalized_statement: ∀ (α : Type*) (G : SemiGraphoid α) (X X' Y Y' Z : Set α), X ⊆ X' → Y ⊆ Y' → G.Indep X' Y' Z → G.Indep X Y Z
op_000001.docstring_summary: Independence descends to smaller left and right sets.
op_000001.statement_formalization_notes: Retained the original direct formalization; it is a valid Lean proposition under the repository scratch wrapper.
